query:
ALTER TABLE `app_users` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cargo` varchar(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `id_funcional` varchar(32),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `setor` varchar(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `email` varchar(255);

INSERT INTO `app_users` (`username`, `password_hash`, `display_name`, `cargo`, `id_funcional`, `setor`, `email`, `role`, `ativo`) VALUES
('admin', 'b516a761ed4f2bd35e7ef2c382d5ef096f2de2787df68dce6c01516c4768160f', 'Administrador', 'Administrador do Sistema', NULL, 'DTIC', NULL, 'admin', 1),
('moises.costa', 'b516a761ed4f2bd35e7ef2c382d5ef096f2de2787df68dce6c01516c4768160f', 'Moisés da Silva Costa', 'Assistente Técnico de Informática', '5028399-5', 'DTIC/Patrimônio', NULL, 'admin', 1),
('Pedro.Bizarelli', 'b516a761ed4f2bd35e7ef2c382d5ef096f2de2787df68dce6c01516c4768160f', 'Pedro Bizarelli', 'Técnico Administrativo', NULL, 'Patrimônio', NULL, 'user', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `display_name` = VALUES(`display_name`), `cargo` = VALUES(`cargo`), `id_funcional` = VALUES(`id_funcional`), `setor` = VALUES(`setor`);
